About the job
Every morning, millions of people lace up their shoes, step outside, and press "start."
They trust that the data on their wrist is accurate—that their effort is recorded and their progress matters.
At Zepp Health, we build the technology behind that trust. Our devices and platforms power a global ecosystem of athletes, runners, and fitness enthusiasts.
But great products don’t exist in isolation. They connect to apps, services, and developer ecosystems around the world.
Those connections are built through software—and that's where you come in.


About This Role

As a Full-Stack Engineer, Connected Partnerships, you will help build and operate the platform that allows external partners to integrate with Zepp Health.
You will work across backend services, APIs, and internal tools, enabling fitness platforms and developers to connect to Zepp’s data and capabilities.
Your work sits between Zepp's internal data platform and external developer ecosystems, ensuring integrations are reliable, secure, and easy to build.
Besides, as a technical point of contact, you will also support our NA Sales and Marketing team to build customer engagement tools, and relay requirements from our customer to engineering team.


What You’ll Do

You will:
Design and implement backend services and APIs for partner integrations
Build internal tools and lightweight web applications to support developer onboarding and integration monitoring
Improve API reliability, performance, and developer experience
Troubleshoot integration issues and collaborate with product and platform teams to resolve them
Help evolve Zepp’s developer platform and API ecosystem
Build lightweight web applications to support sales and marketing team for customer engagement.


Technical Background

You should be comfortable working across multiple layers of the stack, including:
Backend: Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs
Cloud environments and scalable service architectures
API security and integration technologies such as OAuth and webhooks
Building or maintaining full-stack internal tools
You understand how services interact in production and can debug issues across distributed systems.


What You Bring

3+ years of software engineering experience, ideally in backend or full-stack roles
Experience building API-driven systems or SaaS platforms
Solid backend development skills (Java/Spring Boot preferred)
Ability to collaborate across engineering, product, and external partners
Strong problem-solving and communication skills
Experience in wearables, fitness, or health technology is a plus.


Why This Role

The integrations you build will power real products used by people who run, train, hike, and compete every day.
If you want to work on technology that connects platforms, enables developers, and supports a global fitness ecosystem, this role offers the chance to make that impact.




Zepp Health is an Equal Opportunity employer and welcomes everyone to our team. If you need reasonable accommodation at any point in the application or interview process, please let us know.

Sharing pronouns is completely optional and will not affect your application. If you wish, you may indicate the pronouns you use (e.g., she/her, he/him, they/them).
